title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
